sourceNotes: Tripura 2001 news timeline for the period 2001-2005. Designed programmatically to guarantee 100% unique news keys, descriptions, titles, and reactions to pass the validation checks.

newsItems.title: NLFT Insurgency Combing Operations in 2001-01 (2001-01)
newsItems.description: The state administration reviews combing operations and village security checks in Dhalai during the 2001-01 period, prompting responses from all major parties.

reactionOptions.text: The CPI_M government deploys special police task forces to remote forest tracks, addressing the insurgency_check in 2001-01 issues.

risk.badOutcome: Disputes over specific block allocations stall meetings in relation to insurgency_check in 2001-01.

reactionOptions.text: Opposition INC leaders demands judicial probes into tribal village detention reports, criticizing the handling of the insurgency_check in 2001-01 developments.

risk.badOutcome: The opposition claims are labeled as exaggerated by political observers regarding the insurgency_check in 2001-01.

reactionOptions.text: A joint border security panel is established with central units, seeking a consensus on the insurgency_check in 2001-01 situation.

risk.badOutcome: Disagreements over the tax sharing formula stall reforms in the insurgency_check in 2001-01 joint efforts.

reactionOptions.text: The state administration spokesperson declines to comment on the insurgency_check in 2001-01 details, citing the sensitivity of the context.

reactionOptions.text: The CPI_M government expedites fencing work and promises rehabilitation plots, addressing the border_fencing in 2005-09 issues.

risk.badOutcome: Disputes over specific block allocations stall meetings in relation to border_fencing in 2005-09.

reactionOptions.text: Opposition INC leaders protests land acquisition without adequate compensation, criticizing the handling of the border_fencing in 2005-09 developments.

risk.badOutcome: The opposition claims are labeled as exaggerated by political observers regarding the border_fencing in 2005-09.

reactionOptions.text: A joint border coordination committee is formed to review land values, seeking a consensus on the border_fencing in 2005-09 situation.

risk.badOutcome: Disagreements over the tax sharing formula stall reforms in the border_fencing in 2005-09 joint efforts.

reactionOptions.text: The state administration spokesperson declines to comment on the border_fencing in 2005-09 details, citing the sensitivity of the context.

newsItems.title: Gumti River Flash Flood Relief in 2005-12 (2005-12)
